disclosure: Specific response-rate statistic removed. No single verifiable public figure was cited, so the claim was rewritten as a directional industry pattern.

claims.text: Most service businesses take hours, not minutes, to respond to a new lead
Fast response converts meaningfully better than slow response, making follow-up speed a higher-leverage fix than added ad spend in that quadrant
The 2x2 lead-volume/response-speed framework as a way to diagnose whether the bottleneck is acquisition or follow-up
